prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UDRTASSPC-228PC-PZ-AMZ Product Type: ROTARY_TOOL Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: 228pc Deluxe Universal Fit Rotary Tool Accessory Set for Sanding Polishing Cutting Description: Ideal for just about all jobs that require precision, the 228pc Piece Rotary Tool Set is a unique kit with assorted bits and accessories for every job imaginable. For use with marble, concrete, brick, porcelain, ceramics, epoxy, woods, rock, glass, metal, tile, stone, & more.

Whether your craft project is large or small, it most likely has some detail work that requires the right tool for the job. Stick to the basics with this set and you will surely be in good company. Search Terms: assorted bits for rotary tools wood working home project accessories sanding polishing burrs Features: - Universal Fit for All Rotary Type Tools including Dremel compatibility | 1/8th Shank - Sanding Band; Rubber Mandrel for Sanding Band; Fiber Glass Cutoff Wheel; Abrasive Wheels - 15pc Soft Wool; 9pc Pink Aluminum Oxide; 9pc Green Aluminum Oxide; Polishing Woolen Wheel - 30pc Soft Wool; 10pc Hard Wool; Silicon Cutoff Wheel; Aluminum Oxide Cutoff Wheel - Stainless Steel Brush; Mounted Abrasive Point; Diamond Burs; HSS Burs/ Drills; HSS Burs/Drills === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 228-pc Deluxe Universal Fit Rotary Tool Accessory Set

tokens.name: Deluxe Universal Fit Rotary Tool Accessory Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Universal Fit Dremel Compatible, Sanding Polishing Cutting Burrs, Wood Metal Stone Ceramics

openai.title_differentiation: Universal Fit 1 8-Inch Shank, Dremel Compatible, Sanding Polishing Cutting Bits, Burrs, Wheels, Brushes
